modules.module_title: Introduction to Tiffin & Cloud Kitchen Business

questions.question: Ek Home-based Tiffin service ka primary goal kya hota hai?

options.A: Regular customers ko ghar jaisa, healthy khana provide karna
options.B: Sirf party aur events ke liye catering karna
options.C: Bahut mehenge, gourmet dishes bechna

questions.explanation: Tiffin service ka mukhya uddeshya grahakon ko niyamit roop se swasth aur ghar jaisa khana uplabdh karana hai.

questions.question: Cloud kitchen ka doosra popular naam kya hai?

options.B: Ghost kitchen ya Virtual kitchen
options.C: Dhaba

questions.explanation: Cloud kitchens ko ghost kitchens, virtual kitchens, ya dark kitchens bhi kaha jata hai kyunki unka koi physical storefront ya dine-in space nahi hota.

questions.question: India mein home-based food business shuru karne ke liye sabse important legal requirement kya hai?

options.B: FSSAI registration ya license
options.C: GST number

questions.explanation: Bharat mein kisi bhi prakar ka food business chalane ke liye Food Safety and Standards Authority of India (FSSAI) ka registration ya license lena anivarya hai.

questions.question: Business planning mein SWOT analysis mein 'S' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Sales
options.C: Strengths

questions.explanation: SWOT analysis mein S - Strengths (taakat), W - Weaknesses (kamzori), O - Opportunities (avsar), aur T - Threats (khatre) hote hain.

questions.question: Ek safal tiffin business ke liye inme se sabse zaroori kya hai?

options.B: Sirf exotic dishes banana
options.C: Food quality aur consistency maintain karna

questions.explanation: Customer loyalty banane ke liye sabse zaroori hai ki aap hamesha acchi quality ka khana banayein aur taste ko consistent rakhein.

questions.question: 'Aggregator-owned cloud kitchen' model mein kitchen space aur infrastructure kaun provide karta hai?

options.B: Sarkaar (Government)
options.C: Food aggregator jaise Swiggy ya Zomato

questions.explanation: Is model mein, Swiggy Access jaise aggregators, restaurants ko pre-built kitchen spaces provide karte hain jisse unhe naye areas mein expand karne mein aasani hoti hai.

questions.question: Ek business plan banane ka mukhya uddeshya kya hota hai?

options.B: Business ke goals aur unhe haasil karne ki strategy ko outline karna
options.C: Apne competitors ko dikhane ke liye
options.D: Roz ka menu decide karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Business plan ek roadmap ki tarah hota hai jo aapke business ke lakshya, strategies, financial projections, aur operational plans ko detail mein batata hai.

questions.question: Apni tiffin service ke liye 'Target Audience' decide karte waqt kya dhyan mein rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Unka location, profession, aur food preferences
options.C: Sirf unka gender

questions.explanation: Sahi target audience (jaise students, working professionals) ko samajhne ke liye unke location, kaam, aur khane ki pasand jaisi baaton par dhyan dena zaroori hai, taaki aap unki zaroorat poori kar sakein.

questions.question: Ek small food business ke liye GST registration kab anivarya ho jaata hai?

options.A: Jab saalana turnover ek nirdharit seema (threshold limit) se zyada ho jaaye
options.B: Business shuru karte hi
options.C: Jab aap online aggregators par sell karte hain

questions.explanation: GST registration tab zaroori hai jab aapka turnover nirdharit seema ko paar kar de, ya agar aap e-commerce platform (jaise Zomato/Swiggy) ke through sell kar rahe hain, jiske liye turnover limit nahi hai.

questions.question: Apne tiffin business ki 'Brand Identity' banane mein kya shamil hai?

options.B: Packaging ka design
options.C: Customer service ka tarika
options.D: Upar ke sabhi (All of the above)

questions.explanation: Brand identity sirf logo ya naam nahi hai, balki isme packaging, customer experience, aur aapke business ki overall personality shamil hoti hai.

questions.question: Business shuru karne ke liye 'Bootstrapping' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Investors se funding lena
options.C: Apni personal savings aur kam se kam kharch mein business shuru karna

questions.explanation: Bootstrapping ka matlab hai bina kisi bahari nivesh (external investment) ke, apne khud ke paiso se aur kam se kam sansadhano ka istemal karke business ko shuru karna aur chalana.

questions.question: Market research karna kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Apne competitors aur customer ki zarooraton ko samajhne ke liye
options.B: Sirf menu price decide karne ke liye
options.C: Sirf FSSAI license lene ke liye

questions.explanation: Market research se aapko pata chalta hai ki market mein kya chal raha hai, aapke competitors kya kar rahe hain, aur aapke potential customers kya chahte hain.

questions.question: Ek tiffin service ke liye 'USP' (Unique Selling Proposition) kya ho sakti hai?

options.B: Special diet-focused meals (jaise keto, high-protein)
options.C: Eco-friendly packaging ka istemal
options.D: Upar ke sabhi (All of the above)

questions.explanation: USP woh khaasiyat hai jo aapko aapke competitors se alag banati hai. Yeh kuch bhi ho sakta hai - authentic taste, healthy options, ya sustainable practices.

questions.question: Sole Proprietorship business structure ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Ek business jiske bahut saare partners ho
options.B: Ek business jo ek hi vyakti dwara own kiya jaata hai
options.C: Ek private limited company

questions.explanation: Sole Proprietorship ek business ka prakar hai jisme ek hi maalik hota hai aur wahi business ke sabhi fayde aur nuksan ke liye zimmedar hota hai.

questions.question: FSSAI License aur FSSAI Registration mein mukhya antar kya hai?

options.B: Registration chhote businesses ke liye hai, jabki License bade businesses ke liye
options.C: License sasta hota hai
options.D: Registration ke liye zyada documents lagte hain

questions.explanation: FSSAI Registration chhote food business operators (FBOs) ke liye hota hai jinka saalana turnover 12 lakh tak ho. Isse zyada turnover hone par FSSAI State ya Central License ki zaroorat padti hai.

questions.question: Business mein 'Break-Even Point' kya hota hai?

options.A: Jab business ko bahut zyada profit hota hai
options.B: Jab business ko nuksan hota hai
options.C: Woh point jahan business ka total revenue uske total cost ke barabar ho (No Profit, No Loss)

questions.explanation: Break-Even Point woh sales level hai jahan par company na to koi munafa kamati hai aur na hi koi nuksan uthati hai. Saare kharche nikal jaate hain.

questions.question: Ek naye home-based tiffin service ke liye kaunsa marketing method sabse sasta aur prabhavi hai?

options.B: Newspaper advertisement
options.C: Word-of-mouth aur social media marketing (WhatsApp, Facebook)

questions.explanation: Naye aur chhote businesses ke liye, apne social circle aur local community mein word-of-mouth (logon dwara prachar) aur social media platforms ka istemal karna sabse kam kharchila aur asardar tarika hai.

questions.question: Commercial kitchen mein 'First-In, First-Out' (FIFO) method kiske liye istemal hota hai?

options.B: Food ingredients ko store aur use karne ke liye
options.C: Customer orders lene ke liye

questions.explanation: FIFO ka matlab hai jo saaman pehle aaya hai, use pehle istemal karo. Isse food wastage kam hota hai aur purana stock pehle nikal jaata hai.

questions.question: Ek small cloud kitchen ke liye inme se kaunsa equipment sabse zaroori hai?

options.B: Ek commercial 4-burner gas stove, refrigerator, aur sinks
options.C: Ek ice-cream machine

questions.explanation: Kisi bhi kitchen ki basic zaroorat cooking range (gas stove), food ko fresh rakhne ke liye refrigerator, aur safai ke liye sinks hote hain.

questions.question: Kitchen mein accha ventilation (hawadari) aur exhaust system kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Khane ko jaldi thanda karne ke liye
options.B: Dhuaan, garmi aur khane ki smell ko bahar nikalne ke liye
options.C: Kitchen ko sundar dikhane ke liye

questions.explanation: Ek accha exhaust system kitchen mein kaam karne ke mahaul ko behtar banata hai, dhuein aur garmi ko kam karta hai, aur aag lagne ke khatre ko bhi kam karta hai.

questions.question: Stainless steel ke bartan aur surfaces commercial kitchens mein kyun prefer kiye jaate hain?

options.A: Kyunki yeh bahut saste hote hain
options.B: Kyunki yeh non-porous, saaf karne mein aasan aur zang-rodhak (rust-proof) hote hain
options.C: Kyunki yeh bahut halke hote hain
options.D: Kyunki yeh khane ko meetha bana dete hain

questions.explanation: Stainless steel durable hota hai, isme bacteria nahi panapte, aur ise saaf karna bahut aasan hota hai, isliye yeh food safety standards ke liye sabse accha maana jaata hai.

questions.question: Bartan saaf karne ke 3-compartment sink method mein, teesra sink kiske liye hota hai?

options.A: Bartano ko sabun se dhone ke liye (Wash)
options.B: Bartano se sabun hatane ke liye (Rinse)
options.C: Bartano ko sanitize karne ke liye (Sanitize)

questions.explanation: 3-compartment sink method ka sahi kram hai: 1. Wash (sabun aur garam paani), 2. Rinse (saaf paani), 3. Sanitize (sanitizing solution aur paani), iske baad air dry karna.

questions.question: Kitchen mein alag-alag rang ke chopping boards ka istemal kyun kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Kitchen ko colorful banane ke liye
options.B: Cross-contamination ko rokne ke liye
options.C: Alag-alag chef ke liye

questions.explanation: Alag rang ke board alag food items ke liye use hote hain (jaise laal-kaccha meat, hara-sabziyan) taaki kachhe khane ke bacteria pake hue khane mein na jayein.

questions.question: Fire extinguisher ko kitchen mein kahan rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Gas stove ke theek upar
options.C: Ek aasaani se dikhne aur pahunchne wali jagah par, exit ke paas

questions.explanation: Aag bujhane ka yantra aisi jagah hona chahiye jahan aapat sthiti mein use aasani se liya ja sake, aamtaur par kitchen ke bahar nikalne ke raaste ke paas.

questions.question: FSSAI ke anusaar, refrigerator ka ideal temperature kya hona chahiye?

options.B: 5°C ya usse neeche
options.C: 0°C (freezing point)

questions.explanation: Refrigerator ko 5°C ya usse kam तापमान par rakhna chahiye taaki bacteria ki growth ko roka ja sake. Freezer ka तापमान -18°C ya usse kam hona chahiye.

questions.question: Ek combi oven ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Yeh sirf khana garam karta hai
options.B: Yeh ek hi machine mein steam, convection (dry heat) aur dono ka combination provide karta hai
options.C: Yeh sirf bake karne ke kaam aata hai
options.D: Yeh oven bahut sasta hota hai

questions.explanation: Combi oven bahut versatile hota hai. Isme steaming, baking, roasting, sab kuch kiya ja sakta hai, jisse jagah aur samay dono ki bachat hoti hai.

questions.question: Kitchen layout design karte waqt 'work triangle' concept kin teen cheezon ke beech ke aasan movement ko refer karta hai?

options.B: Stove, Microwave, aur Dustbin
options.C: Sink, Dishwasher, aur Storage
options.D: Cutting area, Stove, aur Serving area

questions.explanation: Work triangle kitchen ka ek efficiency concept hai jismein mukhya kaam ki jagah - stove (cooking), sink (cleaning), aur refrigerator (storage) - ek triangle banati hain, jisse chef ko kaam karne mein aasani ho.

questions.question: Kitchen mein pest control (keet niyantran) ka sabse pehla aur zaroori step kya hai?

options.B: Kitchen ko saaf suthra rakhna aur khane ko aese hi khula na chhodna
options.C: Rozana pest control company ko bulana

questions.explanation: Keede-makodon ko rokne ka sabse accha tarika hai unhe khana aur panah na milne dena. Iske liye kitchen ki niyamit safai aur khane ka sahi storage bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Commercial kitchen mein LPG gas cylinder istemal karte waqt kya savdhani baratni chahiye?

options.A: Cylinder ko hamesha leta kar (horizontally) rakhna chahiye
options.B: Gas leak hone par electrical switches on/off nahi karne chahiye
options.C: Leak check karne ke liye maachis ki teeli jalani chahiye
options.D: Cylinder ko stove ke bilkul paas rakhna chahiye

questions.explanation: Gas leak hone par electrical switch on/off karne se chingari (spark) nikal sakti hai, jisse aag lag sakti hai. Isliye aisa bilkul nahi karna chahiye aur darwaze-khidkiyan khol deni chahiye.

questions.question: Kitchen ke farsh par (floor) non-slip mats ka kya kaam hai?

options.A: Floor ko sundar dikhane ke liye
options.B: Girne aur fisalne se bachane ke liye (to prevent slips and falls)
options.C: Floor ko thanda rakhne ke liye
options.D: Floor ko ganda hone se bachane ke liye

questions.explanation: Kitchen mein paani ya tel girne se farsh chikna ho jaata hai. Non-slip mats fisalne se rokte hain aur kaam karne walon ki suraksha sunishchit karte hain.

questions.question: Ek induction cooktop, traditional gas stove se kaise behtar ho sakta hai?

options.B: Yeh energy efficient hai aur kam garmi paida karta hai
options.C: Is par sabhi tarah ke bartan kaam karte hain
options.D: Yeh gas stove se sasta hota hai

questions.explanation: Induction cooktop magnetic field se bartan ko direct garam karta hai, jisse energy waste nahi hoti aur kitchen bhi kam garam hota hai. Yeh gas stove se zyada safe bhi maana jaata hai.

questions.question: Food safety management system, HACCP mein 'CCP' ka full form kya hai?

options.B: Customer Complaint Point
options.C: Critical Control Point

questions.explanation: HACCP (Hazard Analysis and Critical Control Points) mein, CCP woh step hai jahan par control lagakar food safety ke khatre ko roka ya kam kiya ja sakta hai, jaise khane ko sahi temperature tak pakana.

questions.question: Dry storage area (jahan daal, chawal, masale rakhe jaate hain) kaisa hona chahiye?

options.B: Thanda, sookha aur saaf (Cool, dry, and clean)
options.C: Seedhi dhoop mein (Direct sunlight)
options.D: Farsh par saara saaman rakhna chahiye

questions.explanation: Dry food items ko kharab hone se bachane ke liye unhe thandi, sookhi, aur saaf jagah par, deewar aur farsh se thoda upar shelves par store karna chahiye.

questions.question: Apne kitchen equipment ki regular cleaning aur maintenance kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Equipment ki life badhane aur unhe achanak kharab hone se bachane ke liye
options.B: Food safety sunishchit karne ke liye
options.C: Energy efficiency banaye rakhne ke liye
options.D: Upar ke sabhi (All of the above)

questions.explanation: Regular maintenance se equipment lamba chalta hai, achanak breakdown nahi hota, saaf-suthra rehta hai jisse food safe rehta hai, aur sahi se kaam karne par bijli/gas ki bachat bhi hoti hai.

questions.question: Ek tiffin service ke liye menu plan karte waqt sabse pehle kya sochna chahiye?

options.A: Aapke target customers kaun hain aur unhe kya pasand hai
options.B: Aapke paas kaunse mehenge bartan hain
options.C: Aap kaunsi dish nahi bana sakte

questions.explanation: Menu hamesha target audience ko dhyan mein rakh kar banana chahiye. Unki pasand, na-pasand, aur dietary zarooraton ko samajhna sabse zaroori hai.

questions.question: Food Cost Percentage nikalne ka sahi formula kya hai?

options.B: (Total Ingredient Cost / Selling Price) * 100
options.C: Selling Price - Total Ingredient Cost
options.D: Total Ingredient Cost / Number of Portions

questions.explanation: Food cost percentage batata hai ki aapke selling price ka kitna hissa khane ki samagri par kharch hua hai. Formula: (Samagri ki kul lagat / Bikri mulya) * 100.

questions.question: 'À la carte' menu kya hota hai?

options.A: Ek fixed meal jisme sab kuch pehle se tay hota hai
options.B: Ek menu jisme har item alag se order kiya jaata hai aur uski keemat alag hoti hai
options.C: Ek buffet menu

questions.explanation: À la carte French term hai jiska matlab hai 'by the card'. Isme customers apni pasand ke anusar alag-alag dishes order kar sakte hain.

questions.question: Standardized recipe (maanakeekrt vidhi) ka sabse bada fayda kya hai?

options.A: Har baar alag taste milta hai
options.B: Isse food cost badh jaati hai
options.C: Har baar ek jaisa taste, quality aur portion size milta hai
options.D: Ise follow karna bahut mushkil hai

questions.explanation: Standardized recipe se yeh sunishchit hota hai ki koi bhi chef banaye, dish ka swaad, matra, aur gunvatta hamesha ek jaisi rahegi, jisse food cost control mein rehti hai.

questions.question: Kisi sabzi (jaise aloo) ka 'Yield Percentage' food costing mein kya batata hai?

options.B: Chheelne aur kaatne ke baad bachi hui istemal layak matra ka pratishat
options.C: Sabzi ugane mein laga samay

questions.explanation: Yield percentage batata hai ki kharidi hui samagri (As Purchased) mein se, waste (chhilka, etc.) nikalne ke baad kitna hissa (Edible Portion) istemal ke liye bachta hai. Yeh sahi costing ke liye zaroori hai.

questions.question: Menu mein seasonal (mausami) sabziyan aur phal istemal karne ka sabse bada fayda kya hai?

options.B: Yeh aasani se nahi milti
options.C: Yeh sasti, taazi aur swaad mein behtar hoti hain

questions.explanation: Mausami phal aur sabziyan apne season mein bharpoor matra mein uplabdh hoti hain, isliye woh taazi, sasti aur zyada paushtik hoti hain.

questions.question: Ek balanced (santulit) tiffin meal mein kya-kya shamil hona chahiye?

options.B: Sirf chawal aur daal
options.C: Carbohydrates, protein, vitamins aur fats ka sahi mishran

questions.explanation: Ek santulit bhojan mein sharir ki zarooraton ko poora karne ke liye sabhi poshak tatva - jaise roti/chawal (carbs), daal/paneer (protein), sabzi/salad (vitamins) - shamil hone chahiye.

questions.question: Menu Engineering mein 'Star' category ki dish ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Ek dish jo popular nahi hai aur profit bhi kam deti hai
options.B: Ek dish jo bahut popular hai lekin profit kam deti hai
options.C: Ek dish jo bahut popular hai aur profit bhi zyada deti hai
options.D: Ek dish jo popular nahi hai lekin profit zyada deti hai

questions.explanation: Menu engineering mein, 'Stars' woh dishes hoti hain jo high popularity (bahut bikti hain) aur high profitability (accha munafa deti hain) wali hoti hain. Inhe menu mein promote karna chahiye.

questions.question: Tiffin service ke liye kaunsa menu type sabse aam (common) hai?

options.B: Cyclic menu (jo weekly ya monthly repeat hota hai)
options.C: Static menu (jo kabhi nahi badalta)

questions.explanation: Tiffin services aamtaur par cyclic menu ka istemal karti hain, jismein har din alag-alag dishes hoti hain aur menu ek nishchit samay (jaise ek hafta) ke baad repeat hota hai. Isse variety bani rehti hai.

questions.question: Ek dish ka selling price (bikri mulya) decide karte waqt kin cheezon ko dhyan mein rakhna chahiye?

options.B: Food cost, labour cost, overheads (bijli, gas, rent) aur profit margin
options.C: Sirf competitor ka price

questions.explanation: Sahi selling price nirdharit karne ke liye aapko apni sabhi laagaton (direct aur indirect) ko jodna hoga aur uske upar apna desired profit margin lagana hoga.

questions.question: Portion control (matra niyantran) kyun important hai?

options.A: Food cost ko control karne aur consistency banaye rakhne ke liye
options.B: Customer ko kam khana dene ke liye
options.C: Khana jaldi banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Portion control se yeh sunishchit hota hai ki har customer ko ek jaisi matra mein khana mile, jisse food cost predictable rehti hai aur customer satisfaction bhi bana rehta hai.

questions.question: Ingredient ki 'As Purchased' (AP) cost aur 'Edible Portion' (EP) cost mein kya antar hai?

options.B: AP cost poori kharidi hui matra ki hai, jabki EP cost waste nikalne ke baad bachi hui matra ki hai
options.C: EP cost hamesha AP cost se kam hoti hai
options.D: AP cost tax ke baad ki cost hai

questions.explanation: AP cost woh hai jo aap supplier ko poore item ke liye dete hain (jaise 1 kg aloo). EP cost us istemal layak hisse ki actual cost hai jo chheelne ke baad bachta hai (jaise 800 gm aloo).

questions.question: Contribution Margin kaise calculate kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Selling Price / Food Cost
options.C: Selling Price - Food Cost

questions.explanation: Contribution Margin woh rakam hai jo ek dish ko bechne par uski food cost nikalne ke baad bachti hai. Yeh rakam business ke baaki kharchon (labour, overheads) ko cover karne aur profit kamane mein madad karti hai.

questions.question: Menu ko attractive banane ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Dishes ke creative aur aakarshak naam rakhna
options.B: Acche se dish ko describe karna
options.C: Saaf aur padhne mein aasan design ka istemal karna
options.D: Upar ke sabhi (All of the above)

questions.explanation: Ek accha menu sirf dishes ki list nahi hota. Uska design, dishes ke naam, aur unka description customer ke decision ko prabhavit karta hai.

questions.question: Kitchen mein food wastage (khane ki barbadi) kam karne ka ek prabhavi tarika kya hai?

options.B: First-In, First-Out (FIFO) stock rotation method ka palan karna
options.C: Bacha hua khana fenk dena

questions.explanation: FIFO method se yeh sunishchit hota hai ki purana stock pehle istemal ho, jisse cheezein expire hone ya kharab hone se bach jaati hain aur wastage kam hota hai.

questions.question: Restaurant accounting mein Prime Cost kya hota hai?

options.B: Sirf labour ki laagat
options.C: Total Food Cost + Total Labour Cost

questions.explanation: Prime Cost ek restaurant ke do sabse bade kharchon - khane ki samagri (food cost) aur staff ki salary (labour cost) - ka jod hota hai. Is par control rakhna profitability ke liye bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Customer feedback ke aadhar par menu mein badlav karna zaroori hai?

options.A: Haan, isse customer satisfaction badhta hai aur business improve hota hai
options.B: Nahi, menu kabhi nahi badalna chahiye
options.C: Sirf tab badalna chahiye jab nuksan ho raha ho

questions.explanation: Customer feedback aapko batata hai ki unhe kya pasand aa raha hai aur kya nahi. Iske aadhar par menu mein sudhar karne se aap customer ko behtar service de paate hain.

questions.question: FSSAI ka full form kya hai?

options.A: Food Safety and Security Authority of India
options.B: Food Standards and Safety Authority of India
options.C: Food Safety and Standards Authority of India
options.D: Food Supply and Standards Association of India

questions.explanation: FSSAI ka poora naam Food Safety and Standards Authority of India hai, jo Bharat mein khane-peene ki cheezon ke liye standard banati hai.

questions.question: Food ke liye 'Temperature Danger Zone' kya hai, jisme bacteria tezi se badhte hain?

options.B: 5°C se 60°C

questions.explanation: 5 se 60 degree Celsius ke beech ka तापमान bacteria ke panapne ke liye sabse anukool hota hai. Isliye pake hue khane ko is temperature range mein 2 ghante se zyada nahi rakhna chahiye.

questions.question: Khana banane ya handle karne se pehle sabse zaroori hygiene practice kya hai?

options.B: Apne haathon ko sabun aur paani se kam se kam 20 second tak dhona
options.C: Chef cap pehenna

questions.explanation: Haath dhona sabse prabhavi tarika hai keetanuon ko failne se rokne ka aur food ko contaminate hone se bachane ka.

questions.question: Cross-contamination (paar-dushan) ko kaise roka ja sakta hai?

options.A: Kachhe (raw) aur pake hue (cooked) food ke liye alag-alag chopping board aur bartan istemal karke
options.B: Sabhi food items ko ek saath store karke
options.C: Ek hi chaaku se sab kuch kaat kar
options.D: Bina haath dhoye kachhe meat ko haath lagane ke baad salad banana

questions.explanation: Cross-contamination tab hota hai jab kachhe food ke harmful bacteria pake hue food mein transfer ho jaate hain. Ise rokne ke liye alag-alag bartan, chopping board, aur saaf-safai zaroori hai.

questions.question: FSSAI ke anusaar, FoSTaC (Food Safety Training and Certification) training kiske liye anivarya hai?

options.A: Sirf restaurant ke maalik ke liye
options.B: Sirf customers ke liye
options.C: Har FBO (Food Business Operator) ke paas kam se kam ek trained aur certified Food Safety Supervisor hona chahiye
options.D: Yeh kisi ke liye anivarya nahi hai

questions.explanation: FSSAI ne yeh anivarya kiya hai ki har licensed food business mein ek Food Safety Supervisor hona chahiye jiske paas FoSTaC certification ho, taaki food safety practices ko sahi se lagu kiya ja sake.

questions.question: Kachhe meat (raw meat) aur pake hue khane (cooked food) ko refrigerator mein kaise store karna chahiye?

options.A: Kachhe meat ko upar wale shelf par aur pake hue khane ko neeche
options.B: Dono ko ek hi container mein saath-saath
options.C: Kachhe meat ko neeche wale shelf par ek sealed container mein, aur pake hue khane ko upar
options.D: Jaise marzi waise rakh sakte hain

questions.explanation: Kachhe meat ko hamesha neeche rakha jaana chahiye taaki uska juice ya paani tapak kar neeche rakhe pake hue khane par na gire aur use contaminate na kare.

questions.question: Agar kitchen mein kaam karte waqt haath mein cut lag jaye to kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Us par dhyaan na dekar kaam karte rehna
options.B: Ghaav ko saaf karke, us par waterproof bandage lagakar aur phir gloves pehen kar kaam karna
options.C: Sirf paani se dho lena

questions.explanation: Food safety ke liye zaroori hai ki kisi bhi ghaav ya cut ko acchi tarah cover kiya jaaye taaki usse khoon ya bacteria khane mein na mil jaaye.

questions.question: Ek food handler ko agar ulti, dast ya bukhar (vomiting, diarrhea, or fever) ho to use kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Apne supervisor ko batana aur khane se door rehna jab tak theek na ho jaaye
options.C: Sirf gloves pehen kar kaam karna
options.D: Dawa khakar kaam par aa jaana

questions.explanation: Bimari ki haalat mein food handle karne se bimari doosron tak phail sakti hai. Isliye aise mein kaam se door rehna aur aaram karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Packaged food products par 'Best Before' date ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Is date ke baad food khane ke liye unsafe ho jaata hai
options.B: Is date tak food apni best quality (taste, freshness) par rehta hai, par uske baad bhi shayad safe ho sakta hai
options.C: Yeh manufacturing date hai
options.D: Yeh 'Expiry Date' ke jaisa hi hai

questions.explanation: 'Best Before' quality ko darshata hai, jabki 'Expiry Date' safety ko. Best Before date ke baad product ki quality thodi kam ho sakti hai, lekin woh zaroori nahi ki unsafe ho.

questions.question: FSSAI License number kitne digits ka hota hai?
questions.explanation: Har FSSAI licensed Food Business Operator ko ek 14-digit ka unique number diya jaata hai jise unhe apne premises aur food packages par display karna anivarya hota hai.

questions.question: Kitchen ki safai ke liye istemal hone wale chemicals (jaise cleaner, disinfectant) ko kahan store karna chahiye?

options.B: Khane ki samagri se door, ek alag, designated area mein
options.C: Stove ke paas

questions.explanation: Chemicals ko hamesha khane se door store karna chahiye taaki galti se bhi woh khane mein na mil jaayein, jisse chemical contamination ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Frozen food ko thaw (pighlane) karne ka sabse surakshit tarika kaunsa hai?

options.A: Use kitchen counter par poore din ke liye chhod dena
options.B: Use refrigerator ke andar rakh kar thaw karna
options.C: Garam paani mein daal kar

questions.explanation: Refrigerator mein thaw karne se food hamesha safe temperature (5°C se neeche) par rehta hai, jisse bacteria nahi panapte. Counter par chhodna sabse unsafe tarika hai.

questions.question: Ek food handler ki personal hygiene (vyaktigat swachhata) mein kya shamil hai?

options.B: Baalon ko cap ya hairnet se cover karna
options.C: Naakhun kaate hue aur saaf rakhna
options.D: Upar ke sabhi (All of the above)

questions.explanation: Personal hygiene food safety ka ek bahut mahatvapurna hissa hai. Isme saaf kapde, baalon ko dhakna, saaf naakhun, aur niyamit roop se haath dhona shamil hai.

questions.question: Food poisoning ka sabse aam (common) karan kya hai?

options.B: Khane mein harmful bacteria, viruses, ya toxins ka hona
options.C: Bahut zyada thanda khana khana

questions.explanation: Food poisoning aamtaur par dooshit (contaminated) khana khane se hota hai jismein Salmonella, E. coli jaise hanikarak sookshmajeev (microorganisms) maujood hote hain.

questions.question: Food recall kya hota hai aur FSSAI isme kya bhumika nibhata hai?

options.A: Customer dwara food order cancel karna
options.B: Market se unsafe ya mislabeled food product ko wapas lena; FSSAI iski nigrani karta hai
options.C: Restaurant dwara menu se ek dish hatana

questions.explanation: Jab koi food product health ke liye khatarnak paya jaata hai, to use company dwara market se wapas mangwaya jaata hai. FSSAI is poori prakriya ko aadeshit aur monitor karta hai taaki consumers surakshit rahen.

questions.question: Kitchen ka dustbin (koodedaan) kaisa hona chahiye?

options.B: Hamesha bhara hua
options.C: Dhakkan wala (with a lid) aur niyamit roop se saaf hone wala

questions.explanation: Dustbin hamesha dhakka hua hona chahiye taaki usse badboo na aaye aur keede-makode aakarshit na hon. Use rozana khali aur saaf karna bhi zaroori hai.

questions.question: Ek commercial kitchen mein istemal hone wale paani ki testing karwana kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Paani ka rang dekhne ke liye
options.B: Yeh sunishchit karne ke liye ki paani peene aur khana banane ke liye surakshit aur potable hai
options.C: Paani ka bill kam karne ke liye

questions.explanation: FSSAI ke niyamon ke anusaar, commercial kitchen mein istemal hone wala paani peene yogya (potable) hona chahiye. Iski niyamit testing se yeh sunishchit hota hai ki paani mein koi harmful bacteria ya chemical nahi hai.

questions.question: 'Sautéing' cooking method mein kya hota hai?

options.B: Khane ko kam tel mein, tez aanch par jaldi se pakana
options.C: Khane ko dheemi aanch par ghanto tak pakana
options.D: Khane ko oven mein bake karna

questions.explanation: Sautéing ek French cooking term hai jiska matlab hai 'to jump'. Isme food ko ek pan mein thode se fat (tel/butter) ke saath tez aanch par uchhal kar (toss karke) pakaya jaata hai.

questions.question: Batch cooking ka tiffin service mein kya fayda hai?

options.A: Isse khana kharab ho jaata hai
options.B: Ek saath zyada matra mein khana banane se samay aur energy ki bachat hoti hai
options.C: Isse food cost badh jaati hai
options.D: Har order ke liye alag se khana banana padta hai

questions.explanation: Batch cooking mein ek hi cheez (jaise gravy, ya daal) ko badi matra mein bana kar rakh liya jaata hai, jisse order aane par service tez ho jaati hai aur samay ki bachat hoti hai.

questions.question: Gravy ya sauce ko gaadha (thick) karne ke liye aamtaur par kya istemal hota hai?

options.B: Cornstarch ya maide ki slurry
options.C: Cheeni (Sugar)

questions.explanation: Cornstarch (makki ka aata) ya maide ko thande paani mein ghol kar (slurry banakar) garam gravy mein milane se woh gaadhi ho jaati hai. Ise thickening agent kehte hain.

questions.question: Parboiling (adha ubalna) technique ka istemal kyun kiya jaata hai?

options.A: Khane ko poori tarah pakane ke liye
options.B: Khane ke final cooking time ko kam karne ke liye
options.C: Khane ka rang hatane ke liye
options.D: Khane ko meetha banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Parboiling mein sabziyon ya chawal ko thodi der ke liye ubala jaata hai. Isse order aane par unhe jaldi se fry ya bake kiya ja sakta hai, jisse service time kam ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Professional kitchen mein 'Mise en place' (meez-on-plahs) ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Cooking shuru karne se pehle saari samagri ko kaat kar, naap kar taiyar rakhna
options.C: Kitchen ki safai karna

questions.explanation: Yeh ek French culinary phrase hai jiska matlab hai 'everything in its place'. Iska matlab hai ki chef cooking shuru karne se pehle sabhi zaroori cheezein taiyar rakhta hai, jisse cooking process smooth aur efficient ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Food presentation (khane ki prastuti) kyun important hai?

options.A: Yeh important nahi hai, sirf taste ahem hai
options.B: Acche presentation se khana zyada aakarshak lagta hai aur customer ka experience behtar hota hai
options.C: Isse food cost kam ho jaati hai

questions.explanation: Log pehle aankhon se khate hain. Ek sundar tarike se parosa gaya khana customer ki bhookh badhata hai aur unhe ek accha anubhav deta hai.

questions.question: Marination ka mukhya uddeshya kya hai?

options.B: Food mein flavour add karna aur use tender (mulayam) banana
options.C: Food ko preserve karna

questions.explanation: Marination mein food (khaaskar meat ya paneer) ko masalon, dahi ya acidic liquid ke mishran mein kuch der rakha jaata hai, jisse masale andar tak chale jaate hain aur food mulayam ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Steaming (bhaap mein pakana) cooking method ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Isse khana crispy ho jaata hai
options.B: Yeh ek healthy cooking method hai kyunki isme kam tel lagta hai aur nutrients bache rehte hain
options.C: Isme khana bahut jaldi pakta hai
options.D: Isse khane ka swaad chala jaata hai

questions.explanation: Bhaap mein pakane se khane ke poshak tatva (nutrients) nasht nahi hote aur tel ka istemal na ke barabar hota hai, isliye yeh ek bahut hi swasth tarika hai.

questions.question: Pake hue khane ko dobara garam (reheat) karne ka sahi aur surakshit tarika kya hai?

options.A: Use dheere-dheere kam temperature par garam karna
options.B: Use kam se kam 75°C tak, jaldi se garam karna
options.C: Use thoda sa garam karke serve kar dena
options.D: Use baar-baar garam aur thanda karna

questions.explanation: Food safety ke liye, khane ko reheat karte waqt use tezi se 75°C ya usse zyada ke internal temperature tak garam karna chahiye taaki usme maujood koi bhi bacteria nasht ho jaaye.

questions.question: Sous-vide (soo-veed) cooking technique kya hai?

options.B: Khane ko vacuum-sealed bag mein daal kar, ek controlled temperature wale water bath mein dheere-dheere pakana
options.C: Khane ko pressure cooker mein pakana

questions.explanation: Sous-vide ek modern cooking technique hai jismein food ko ek nishchit तापमान par paani mein pakaya jaata hai. Isse food bahut hi evenly aur perfectly pakta hai.

questions.question: Deep frying ke liye tel ka aadarsh (ideal) तापमान aamtaur par kya hota hai?
questions.explanation: Sahi तापमान par fry karne se food bahar se crispy aur andar se pak jaata hai, aur zyada tel bhi nahi sokhta. Bahut kam ya zyada तापमान se food kharab ho sakta hai.

questions.question: Pyaaz ko caramelize karne mein kya hota hai?

options.A: Pyaaz ko tez aanch par jalana
options.B: Pyaaz ko dheemi aanch par dheere-dheere pakana jab tak uski natural sugar brown na ho jaaye
options.C: Pyaaz mein cheeni daalna

questions.explanation: Caramelization ek aisi prakriya hai jismein pyaaz ko kam aanch par pakane se uski mithaas bahar aati hai aur uska rang gehra bhura ho jaata hai, jisse dishes mein ek alag hi swaad aata hai.

questions.question: Garnishing ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Dish ko serve karne se pehle use hara dhaniya, pudina ya anya cheezon se sajana
options.C: Khane ko pack karna

questions.explanation: Garnishing ka matlab hai khane ko parosne se pehle use kisi khane yogya cheez se sajana taaki woh dekhne mein aur aakarshak lage.

questions.question: Ek acchi quality ka stock (yakhni) banane ka mukhya aadhar kya hai?

options.B: Haddiyan (bones), sabziyan (vegetables), aur sugandhit masale (aromatics)
options.C: Sirf paani aur namak

questions.explanation: Stock ek flavorful liquid hai jo soups aur sauces ka base hota hai. Yeh aamtaur par haddiyon, sabziyon (jaise pyaaz, gaajar), aur masalon ko paani mein dheere-dheere ubal kar banaya jaata hai.

questions.question: Emulsification process ka ek aam kitchen udaharan kya hai?

options.B: Mayonnaise banana (tel aur ande ki zardi ko milana)
options.C: Chawal pakana

questions.explanation: Emulsification woh prakriya hai jismein do aise liquids ko milaya jaata hai jo aamtaur par aapas mein nahi milte, jaise tel aur paani. Mayonnaise mein ande ki zardi emulsifier ka kaam karti hai.

questions.question: Baking aur Roasting mein mool antar kya hai?

options.B: Baking aamtaur par bread, cake ke liye use hota hai, jabki Roasting meat, sabziyon ke liye
options.C: Baking mein zyada तापमान lagta hai
options.D: Roasting mein paani ka istemal hota hai

questions.explanation: Dono hi dry heat cooking methods hain, lekin 'baking' शब्द aamtaur par un cheezon ke liye istemal hota hai jinka structure cooking ke dauran banta hai (jaise cake). 'Roasting' solid cheezon (jaise chicken) ke liye istemal hota hai.

questions.question: Ek chef ke liye acchi knife skills (chaaku chalaane ki kala) hona kyun zaroori hai?

options.A: Sabziyon ko tezi se aur ek samaan kaatne ke liye
options.B: Kaam mein efficiency badhane ke liye
options.C: Chot lagne ke khatre ko kam karne ke liye
options.D: Upar ke sabhi (All of the above)

questions.explanation: Acchi knife skills se na sirf kaam jaldi aur behtar hota hai, balki sabziyan ek size ki katne se woh pakti bhi ek samaan hain. Saath hi, sahi technique se chaaku istemal karne se durghatna ka khatra kam ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Tiffin ya cloud kitchen se food delivery ke liye sabse zaroori cheez kya hai?

options.B: Samay par aur surakshit tarike se khana pahunchana
options.C: Free mein delivery karna

questions.explanation: Customer ke liye sabse mahatvapurna hai ki unka khana sahi samay par aur acchi condition mein un tak pahuche. Timely and safe delivery customer satisfaction ki kunji hai.

questions.question: Cloud kitchen ke liye online food aggregators (jaise Zomato, Swiggy) par list hone ka sabse bada fayda kya hai?

options.B: Aapko ek bade customer base tak pahunch milti hai bina marketing ke kharch ke
options.C: Aapko apna menu decide nahi karna padta
options.D: Woh aapke kitchen ki safai karte hain

questions.explanation: Aggregator platforms par pehle se hi laakhon users hote hain. Un par list hone se aapka kitchen un sabhi users ko dikhta hai, jisse aapko aasani se orders milne lagte hain.

questions.question: Apne customers se feedback (pratikriya) lene ka sabse aasan tarika kya hai?

options.B: Ek chhota feedback form ya WhatsApp message bhejna
options.C: Unke ghar jaakar poochhna
options.D: Sirf negative comments par dhyan dena

questions.explanation: Digital tarike jaise WhatsApp, SMS ya ek simple online form bhejna feedback lene ka aasan aur prabhavi tarika hai. Isse customer ko bhi suvidha hoti hai.

questions.question: Digital marketing mein SEO ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Search Engine Optimization
options.C: Service Engine Optimization

questions.explanation: SEO (Search Engine Optimization) ek aisi prakriya hai jisse aapki website ya online listing ko Google jaise search engines par behtar rank milti hai, taaki zyada log aapko dhoondh sakein.

questions.question: Ek tiffin service ki 'Unit Economics' calculate karte waqt kin cheezon ko consider kiya jaata hai?

options.B: Prati tiffin (per unit) ka revenue aur usse judi saari laagat (food, packaging, delivery)
options.C: Poore mahine ka profit

questions.explanation: Unit economics ka matlab hai har ek unit (is case mein, ek tiffin) par hone wale fayde ya nuksan ka hisaab. Isse yeh pata chalta hai ki aapka business model long-term mein profitable hai ya nahi.

questions.question: Food packaging ka primary (mukhya) uddeshya kya hai?

options.B: Khane ko delivery ke dauran surakshit, garam aur taaza rakhna
options.C: Packaging ko mehenga banana

questions.explanation: Acchi packaging khane ko contamination, tapman mein badlav aur physical damage se bachati hai, taaki woh customer tak sahi sthiti mein pahunche.

questions.question: Agar koi customer food quality ki shikayat (complaint) kare, to aapka pehla kadam kya hona chahiye?

options.B: Shikayat ko ignore kar dena
options.C: Dhairya se customer ki baat sunna, maafi maangna aur samasya ka samadhan offer karna

questions.explanation: Ek naraz customer ko sambhalne ka sabse accha tarika hai unki baat ko ahmiyat dena, unse maafi maangna aur unhe ek santoshjanak samadhan (jaise refund ya replacement) dena. Isse unka vishwas bana rehta hai.

questions.question: Apne cloud kitchen ke liye social media marketing ka ek udaharan dijiye.

options.A: Apne khane ki acchi photos Instagram ya Facebook par post karna
options.B: Newspaper mein advertisement dena
options.C: Pamphlet bantwana

questions.explanation: Social media platforms jaise Instagram aur Facebook visual content ke liye best hain. Apni dishes ki aakarshak photos aur videos post karke aap aasani se customers ko attract kar sakte hain.

questions.question: CRM (Customer Relationship Management) software ka cloud kitchen mein kya upyog ho sakta hai?

options.B: Customer ka data, unke order history aur preferences ko track karne ke liye
options.C: Kitchen ki safai ke liye
options.D: Staff ki salary banane ke liye

questions.explanation: CRM software customer ki jaankari (jaise naam, number, pichhle orders) ko ek jagah store karta hai, jisse aap unhe personalized service aur offers de sakte hain.

questions.question: Business mein 'Customer Lifetime Value' (CLV) ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Ek customer ka pehla order value
options.B: Ek customer se uske poore samay aapke saath jude rehne par hone wali kul kamai ka anuman
options.C: Ek customer ko acquire karne ka kharcha
options.D: Saal ke ant mein hone wala profit

questions.explanation: CLV ek anuman hai ki ek customer apne poore relationship ke dauran aapke business ko kitna revenue dega. Yeh loyal customers ki ahmiyat ko darshata hai.

questions.question: Ek order management system (OMS) ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Alag-alag platforms (Zomato, Swiggy, phone calls) se aane wale sabhi orders ko ek jagah manage karna
options.C: Sirf customer feedback lena

questions.explanation: OMS sabhi sroton se aane wale orders ko ek single dashboard par dikhata hai, jisse unhe accept karna, track karna aur manage karna aasan ho jaata hai aur koi order miss nahi hota.

questions.question: Ek negative online review ko kaise handle karna chahiye?

options.B: Reviewer se online jhagda karna
options.C: Publicly, professional tarike se jawab dena, maafi maangna aur samasya ko offline suljhane ki peshkash karna
options.D: Review ko poori tarah ignore kar dena

questions.explanation: Negative review ka professional tareeke se jawab dena dikhata hai ki aap customer feedback ko serious lete hain. Isse doosre potential customers par bhi accha prabhav padta hai.

questions.question: Digital marketing mein 'A/B Testing' ka kya matlab hai?

options.A: Do alag-alag business ideas ko test karna
options.B: Ek marketing campaign ke do versions (jaise do alag-alag ad images) ko compare karke dekhna ki kaunsa behtar perform karta hai
options.C: Menu ki do alag-alag dishes ko test karna
options.D: Apne staff ke do members ko test karna

questions.explanation: A/B testing mein audience ko do hisson mein baant kar unhe ek hi cheez ke do variants (A aur B) dikhaye jaate hain. Isse pata chalta hai ki kaunsa variant zyada prabhavi hai.

questions.question: Apni tiffin service ko promote karne ke liye 'word-of-mouth' marketing kaise badhayein?

options.B: Customer service par dhyan na dekar
options.C: Behtareen khana aur service dekar, aur satisfied customers ko referral discount offer karke

questions.explanation: Jab customers aapke khane aur service se khush hote hain, to woh khud hi doosre logon ko aapke baare mein batate hain. Referral program is prakriya ko aur bhi badhava de sakta hai.

questions.question: Cloud kitchen mein inventory management (stock prabandhan) kyun zaroori hai?

options.B: Ingredients ki kami (shortage) ya adhikta (wastage) se bachne ke liye aur food cost control karne ke liye
options.C: Sirf yeh dekhne ke liye ki store room mein kitni jagah hai
options.D: Sirf supplier se accha rishta banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Sahi inventory management se aapko pata rehta hai ki aapke paas kitna saaman hai, kab order karna hai. Isse achanak koi cheez khatam nahi hoti aur na hi expire hone se waste hoti hai, jisse paiso ki bachat hoti hai.
